fragment.trace: MCP request <metadata name="user_oid" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-oid", ""))" /> <metadata name="client_id" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-client-id", ""))" /> <metadata name="principal_type" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-principal-type", ""))" /> <metadata name="mcp_server" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("mcp-server-name", ""))" /> <metadata name="mcp_method" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("mcp-method", ""))" /> <metadata name="mcp_tool_name" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("mcp-tool-name", ""))" /> <metadata name="cache_hit_obo" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("cache-hit-obo", "n/a"))" /> <metadata name="correlation_id" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("correlation-id", ""))" />
